zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de Boulogne於大約1131年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯福洛斯時，她的父親Pharamus de Boulogne11129歲，母親Matilda Ridel23歲。她於大約1160年與Enguerrand de Fiennes在英國英格蘭薩默塞特馬托可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1223年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybille de Boulogne于大约1131年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯福洛斯时，她的父亲Pharamus de Boulogne11129岁，母亲Matilda Ridel23岁。她于大约1160年与Enguerrand de Fiennes在英国英格兰薩默塞特馬托可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1223年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de Boulogne was born about 1131, in Foulognes, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Pharamus de Boulogne, was 11129 and her mother, Matilda Ridel, was 23. She married Enguerrand de Fiennes about 1160, in Martock, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1223.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille de Boulogne est née environ 1131, à Foulognes, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Pharamus de Boulogne, avait 11129 ans et sa mère, Matilda Ridel, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand de Fiennes environ 1160, à Martock, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1223.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybille de Boulogne um 1131 in Foulognes, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pharamus de Boulogne 11129 und ihre Mutter Matilda Ridel 23. Sie hat um 1160 in Martock, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Enguerrand de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1223.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Boulogne è nata il circa 1131 nel Foulognes, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Pharamus de Boulogne, aveva 11129 anni e sua madre, Matilda Ridel, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand de Fiennes circa 1160, nel Martock, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1223.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille de Boulogneが約1131年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスフォウログンスで生まれた時，父Pharamus de Boulogneは11129歳，母Matilda Ridelは23歳であった。約1160年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトマルトックでEnguerrand de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1223年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de Boulogne(이)가 대략 1131년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 포우로그네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pharamus de Boulogne(은)는 11129세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Ridel(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 마톡에서 Enguerrand de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1223년 이후 사망했다.

mn.Wendover, Buckinghamshire, England, Unit: Wendover, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Foulognes, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Pharamus de Boulogne, tinha 11129 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Ridel, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand de Fiennes aproximadamente 1160, em Martock, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1223.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille de Boulogne родилась около 1131 г. в местности фоулогнесь, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Pharamus de Boulogne было 11129 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Ridel, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand de Fiennes около 1160 г. в местности мартокк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1223 г.

sm.about 1131–after 1223: e tusa o le 1131–ina ua ma'ea le 1223

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybille de Boulogne nació aproximadamente 1131, en Foulognes, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Pharamus de Boulogne, tenía 11129 años y su mamá, Matilda Ridel, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Enguerrand de Fiennes aproximadamente 1160, en Martock, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1223.
